channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Retired Generals Condemn Constitutional Amendment No. 3, Call for Lawful National Resistance...
item.description: By Reason Wafawarova A group describing itself as Retired Generals and Senior Civil Servants of Zimbabwe has issued one of... Continue reading "Retired Generals Condemn Constitutional Amendment No. 3, Call for Lawful National Resistance..." (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Vice President Narrowly Survives Military Helicopter Crash Soon After Take-off... Here are all the times President Mnangagwa survived ‘accidents’
item.description: NAKONDE – The dust had barely settled on the makeshift helipad in the border town of Nakonde when the silence of the Muchinga Province was shattered by the grinding of metal and the splintering of timber. In what can only be described as a miraculous escape, Zambia’s Vice President, Mutale Nalumango, walked away from the [...] The post Vice President Narrowly Survives Military Helicopter Crash Soon After Take-off... Here are all the times President Mnangagwa survived ‘accidents’ first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.description: President Emmerson Dambudzo Mnangagwa on Saturday presented a brand new Toyota Land Cruiser 300 Series to Johane The 5th of... Continue reading "Mnangagwa Hands Over Brand New Motor Vehicle To Church Leader" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Former Botswana president Ian Khama alleges assassination plot linked to Zimbabwe government @nehandaradio
item.description: Former Botswana President Ian Khama claims he has been warned of an alleged assassination plot linked to Zimbabwe, saying two sources alerted him to the threat after his criticism of President Emmerson Mnangagwa’s government. The post Former Botswana president Ian Khama alleges assassination plot linked to Zimbabwe government appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Zim urged to turn SAATM policy into routes, jobs at Harare Airshow @bulawayo24
item.description: HARARE - Zimbabwe has been urged to move "from commitment to measurable implementation" of the Single African Air Transport Market (SAATM) as government officials, regulators and aviation leaders gath... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Zim pushes SAATM rollout at Harare Airshow @bulawayo24
item.description: HARARE - Zimbabwe has pledged to accelerate the liberalisation of African skies as it hosted the Single African Air Transport Market (SAATM) Pilot Implementation Project Airshow in Harare.Speaking at... #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

Mashonaland Central survived a heart-stopping finale at Old Hararians Sports Club in Harare on Thursda

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: RBZ launches Schools Monetary Policy Challenge to nurture future economic leaders @ReserveBankZIM
item.description: THE Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe (RBZ) this Friday launched the Schools Monetary Policy Challenge (SMPC), an initiative designed to equip learners with financial literacy skills while exposing them to real-world monetary policy issues and national economic discourse. The programme, which will run until December 2026, is open to all registered secondary and high schools in [...] The post RBZ launches Schools Monetary Policy Challenge to nurture future economic leaders appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Two female suspects nabbed over job scam on WhatsApp @PoliceZimbabwe
item.description: POLICE in Harare have arrested two women for allegedly running an employment scam on WhatsApp that duped more than 100 job seekers, while another man was picked up in connection with 34 armed robbery cases in the capital’s high-density suburbs. Zimbabwe Republic Police national spokesperson, Commissioner Paul Nyathi, confirmed the arrests in a statement. “The [...] The post Two female suspects nabbed over job scam on WhatsApp appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Warriors defender Shane Maroodza makes European debut
item.description: Warriors star Shane Maroodza impressed on his European debut, playing the full match as FK Sarajevo opened their UEFA campaign. The post Warriors defender Shane Maroodza makes European debut appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
